name: kxoxxy-runtime-guard
description: Guardrails for hybrid runtime work in KxoxxyDex.

interface.shortDescription: Guards hybrid DB and snapshot workflows.
interface.longDescription: Enforces the repo's hybrid runtime rules, doc read order, and verification expectations before data-flow changes.
defaultPrompt: Check the hybrid runtime rules before changing data flow.
Verify whether this route is DB-backed or snapshot-backed.
List the docs and files to read before editing daily or teams.
